meta.name: cc-luphaz
meta.description: Claude Code for luphaz: built-in claude-code + read-only on source trees (~/git/dotfiles ~/dd/workspaces-dotfiles + 5 DD repos under ~/dd) with rw scoped to each repo's .claude/worktrees + custom network allowlist. ~/.dotfiles and ~/.dd-dotfiles are symlink overlays; we target the canonical ~/git/dotfiles and ~/dd/workspaces-dotfiles paths since nono matches literal strings. The built-in claude-code profile already grants rw to the whole $HOME/.claude tree and $HOME/.claude.json — we don't redeclare those here.
